subcodes.first_line: He Who is the Intended One testifieth from within the Most Great Prison unto that which the Tongue of Eternity testified in the Ancient of Days: O Husayn, He maketh mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد المقصود فی السجن الاعظم بما شهد لسان القدم فی ازل الازال یا حسین یذکرک
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
